LanguageData.VEE_Alphabeavers.label: alphabeavers
LanguageData.VEE_Aurora.label: aurora
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.label: fertile rains
LanguageData.VEE_FertileRains.letterText: Unusually nutrient-rich rainfall is sweeping across the region, boosting plant growth for its duration.
LanguageData.VEE_Infestation.label: infestation
LanguageData.VEE_Infestation.letterText:
Giant insects are tunneling towards you! They will break through in a few seconds and plant hives.

The hives will spawn more insects and more hives.

If you don't want the insects to infest the whole area, destroy the hives. But beware - the bugs will defend their home.
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.label: herd migration
LanguageData.VEE_MigratoryHerds.letterText: A group of {0} is passing through the area.\n\nThey won't attack unless provoked.
LanguageData.VEE_TidalFloodingIncident.label: tidal flooding
LanguageData.VEE_TornadoAlley.label: tornado
